system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_baogia_govan_get3","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_BAOGIA_GOVAN_GET3] 
(
	@masp NVARCHAR (200),
	@baoGiaID UNIQUEIDENTIFIER
)
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT a.masp,
          a.mact,
          a.stt,
          a.chitiet,
          a.nguyenlieu,
          a.danveneer,
          a.veneer_canh,
          a.loaiveneer,
          a.dayy_tc,
          a.rong_tc,
          a.dai_tc,
          a.soluong_tc,
          a.mong,
		  CASE 
	          WHEN ISNULL(a.nguyenlieu,'') = '0' OR ISNULL(a.nguyenlieu,'') = '' THEN 0
		  ELSE
			  ROUND
			  (
				   (  a.dayy_tc
					* a.rong_tc
					* a.dai_tc 
					* a.soluong_tc)
				 / 1000000000,
				 5)
	      END AS m3,
          ISNULL (a.veneer_1_mat, 0) veneer_1_mat,
          ISNULL (a.veneer_2_mat, 0) veneer_2_mat,
          ISNULL (a.veneer_dan_canh, 0) veneer_dan_canh,
          a.veneer_matchinh,
		  a.veneer_matphu,
		  a.uv_canhdai, a.uv_canhngan, a.uv_matchinh, a.uv_matphu,
		  a.uv_canhdai1, a.uv_canhngan1, a.uv_matchinh1, a.uv_matphu1,
          a.ghichu,
          a.t_sort, 
		  a.dongia_nhancong, a.dongia_nhancong1, a.dongia_nhancong2, a.dongia_nhancong3, a.dongia_nhancong4,
		  a.dongia_nhancong5, a.dongia_nhancong6, a.dongia_nhancong7, a.dongia_nhancong8, a.dongia_nhancong9,
		  a.dongia_nhancong10, a.dongia_nhancong11, a.dongia_nhancong12,
		  COALESCE(A.trongluongrieng, B.trongluongrieng) AS trongluongrieng,
		  A.fsc_id, A.phantram_tang, A.dongia_goc
   INTO #TMP
   FROM  tr_baogia_govan A LEFT JOIN tr_nguyenlieu_gva B ON A.nguyenlieu = B.nguyenlieu
   WHERE a.masp = @MaSP AND A.baoGiaID = @baoGiaID


   SELECT *
   FROM #TMP
   ORDER BY t_sort, stt

   DROP TABLE #TMP
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_baogia_govan","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
